creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
+--On 5 novembre 2013 13:27:20 +0400 arrowdodger <6yearold@gmail.com> wrote:
| What's %%PORTDOCS%% in pkg-plist, by the way? I haven't found it in
| porters handbook.

It either contains an empty string, or the string "@comment " so that the
lines are ignored depending if the user wants the docs to be installed or
not.

-- 
Mathieu Arnold
